00 02 20 02 20 02 40 02 40 02 60 02 60 02 80 02 
80 02 FF FF FF FF 20 03 49 44 4C 45 00 00 09 25 
63 09 25 75 09 25 75 09 25 75 0D 0A 00 00 52 78 
00 00 54 58 00 00 54 6D 72 20 53 76 63 00 01 00
